title: otopappus guatemalensis
intro: Otopappus guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan tree daisy, is a shrub-like plant native to Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Otopappus guatemalensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
